title: SFC Recipe
description: JSON Schema for IEC 61131-3 SFC recipe definitions used by the MicroDCS SFC engine.

anyOf.title: NonStored
anyOf.description: Non-stored: action executes while the step is active.

anyOf.title: Pulse
anyOf.description: Pulse: action executes once on step entry.

anyOf.title: FallingEdge
anyOf.description: Falling edge: action executes once on step exit.

anyOf.title: RisingEdge
anyOf.description: Rising edge: action executes once on step entry (alias for P).

anyOf.title: Set
anyOf.description: Set/stored: action starts on step entry and persists until explicitly reset.

anyOf.title: Reset
anyOf.description: Reset: cancels a previously set (stored) action.

anyOf.title: TimeLimited
anyOf.description: Time limited: action executes for a maximum duration.

anyOf.title: TimeDelayed
anyOf.description: Time delayed: action starts after a delay from step entry.

SfcActionQualifier.description: IEC 61131-3 action qualifier controlling when and how an action executes relative to its step.

SfcInteraction.description: Equipment interaction pattern: push_command sends an outgoing command, pull_event waits for an incoming event.

SfcBranchType.description: Branch type: selection (OR — one path taken) or simultaneous (AND — all paths execute in parallel).

Initial.description: Whether this is the initial step (exactly one per recipe).

SfcStep.description: A named step in the SFC sequence. Steps are the states of the SFC state machine.

Priority.description: Priority for selection divergence (lower = higher priority).

SfcTransition.description: A directed edge between steps (or branch constructs). Transitions carry conditions that determine when execution advances.

Step.description: Step name this action is associated with.

TypeId.description: Type identifier for the outgoing command or expected incoming event.

TimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum wait time in seconds before expiration handling.

Parameters.description: Step-specific parameters passed to the action.

SfcActionAssociation.description: Associates an action with a step, including the interaction pattern and IEC 61131-3 action qualifier.

Name.description: Branch identifier (used as source/target in transitions).

Branches.description: Each inner list is a sequence of step names forming one branch path.

SfcBranch.description: Branching construct: selection (OR) or simultaneous (AND) divergence.

Transitions.description: All transitions between steps and/or branch constructs.

SfcRecipe.description: An IEC 61131-3 SFC recipe definition. Contains steps, transitions, action associations, and optional branching constructs.
